agent2: done too. Command.parse_args - added call to new Command._resolve_dynamic_defaults(ctx) after the per-param loop. types.py - added validate_dynamic_default()/_dynamic_default_sample() helpers and updated convert_type() to guess type from dict defaults. No overlap with your batch_size/__debug__ region or type_cast_value override. All 739 existing tests pass.
